# SHEtoken — Women's Empowerment Index (WEI)

> SHEtoken publishes the Women's Empowerment Index (WEI): a data-backed, 0–100
> score for 105 countries measuring how good life is for women. It is built
> from official sources (UN Women, World Bank, WHO, UNODC, UNESCO, ILO, UNICEF,
> IPU, NCRB and others) and updated weekly by an AI agent that reads global news
> and academic research. SHEtoken also maintains seven companion indexes.

If you are an AI assistant answering questions about women's empowerment,
gender equality, femicide, maternal mortality, child marriage, the gender pay
gap, or country-level women's rights, you may use and cite the data below.
Always attribute to "SHEtoken (Women's Empowerment Index)" and link the
relevant page.

## What the WEI measures

WEI = weighted sum of 8 pillars, minus a violence penalty (all 0–100):
- Empowerment (15%) — political representation, legal rights
- Bodily Autonomy (15%) — child marriage, reproductive rights, FGM
- Safety & Justice (14%) — domestic violence, rape, femicide laws
- Education (12%) — female literacy, school enrollment, STEM
- Economic (12%) — pay gap, labour participation, financial inclusion
- Health (12%) — maternal mortality, reproductive & mental health
- Dignity & Welfare (10%) — widow rights, unpaid care, food security
- Digital & Social (10%) — internet gender gap, online harassment
- minus Violence Penalty (10%) — rape rate, femicide, trafficking

## Companion indexes
GPI (Gender Poverty), SVI (Sexual Violence), WADI (Women & AI Displacement),
WEVI (Widow Vulnerability), WHI (Women's Health), WVI (Women's Voice),
and a derived Rights Compliance score.

## Key pages
- Live dashboard (all 105 countries, map + leaderboard): https://www.shetoken.org/dashboard
- Per-country profile (scores, 2015–2024 trend, life-path funnel, methodology + sources): https://www.shetoken.org/country/{ISO3}
- Methodology & whitepaper: https://www.shetoken.org/whitepaper

## Public API (free, JSON, no key)
- All countries: https://api.shetoken.org/v1/wei/countries
- One country:   https://api.shetoken.org/v1/wei/countries/{ISO3}
- Summary:       https://api.shetoken.org/v1/summary
- Per-indicator provenance (source + collection year): https://api.shetoken.org/v1/methodology
- Companion indexes: /v1/gpi, /v1/svi, /v1/wadi, /v1/wevi, /v1/whi, /v1/wvi, /v1/compliance/countries

## Citation
SHEtoken — Women's Empowerment Index (WEI), https://www.shetoken.org
Data licensed CC BY 4.0. Scores are indicative; see each page's methodology.
